company.name: CHELSEA FC HOLDINGS LIMITED
company.hook: A sanctions-forced sale, and a holding company that existed for six weeks
company.blurb: Roman Abramovich's Fordstam Limited controlled Chelsea for six years. After Abramovich was sanctioned in March 2022, the club passed through an interim vehicle — Blueco 22 Limited, a beneficial owner for just 43 days — before landing with the Boehly–Clearlake structure. The interim owner is invisible on the live register; only the history shows it.

filings.description: Notification of Blueco 22 Midco Limited as a PSC on 12 July 2022
Cessation of Blueco 22 Limited as a PSC on 12 July 2022
Change of details for Blueco 22 Midco Limited as a PSC

stats.comparison: Reaching the ultimate owner means walking 3 layer(s) up the chain through 7 companies — each its own PSC page and filing history on Companies House. Here it is one timeline.
